This can lead to unauthorized access to sensitive files such as:  ...    ### How Does Path Traversal Work?

Most operating systems use special sequences in file paths: - `..\`(dot-dot-backslash) moves up one directory in Windows. - `../`(dot-dot-slash) moves up one directory in Linux/macOS.  ...    Windows Example
